zh.lifeSummary: 當David Olifard於大約1115年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾利爾福德 姆 維格斯索普時，他的父親William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns27歲，母親Muriel22歲。他於1129年與Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard在蘇格蘭洛包爾凱爾索結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1124年住在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾。他在南非卡阿普洛文希洛迪安斯被列為justicary。他去世於1170年在蘇格蘭洛包爾凱爾索享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Olifard于大约1115年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾利爾福德 姆 維格斯索普时，他的父亲William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns27岁，母亲Muriel22岁。他于1129年与Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard在苏格兰洛包爾凱爾索结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1124年住在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾。他在南非卡阿普洛文希洛迪安斯被列为justicary。他去世于1170年在苏格兰洛包爾凱爾索享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Olifard was born about 1115, in Lilford cum Wigsthorpe, Northamptonshire, England, his father, William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns, was 27 and his mother, Muriel, was 22. He married Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard in 1129, in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom in 1124. His occupation is listed as justicary in Lothians, Cape Province, South Africa. He died in 1170, in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Olifard est né environ 1115, à Lilford cum Wigsthorpe, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Muriel, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard en 1129, à Kelso, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1124. Sa profession de son indiquée est justicary à Lothians, Kaapprovinsie, Afrique du Sud. Il est décédé en 1170, à Kelso, Roxburghshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Olifard um 1115 in Lilford cum Wigsthorpe, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns 27 und seine Mutter Muriel 22. Er hat 1129 in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1124 hat er in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. sein Beruf ist als justicary in Lothians, Kaapprovinsie, Südafrika aufgeführt. Er starb 1170 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Olifard è nato il circa 1115 nel Lilford cum Wigsthorpe, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Muriel, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard nel 1129, nel Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1124. La sua occupazione è indicata come justicary nel Lothians, Kaapprovinsie, Sudafrica. Morì nel 1170, nel Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David Olifardが約1115年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリルフォード クウム ウィグスソルペで生まれた時，父William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearnsは27歳，母Murielは22歳であった。1129年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアケルソでJoan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1124年にはイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアに住んでいた。南アフリカカアップロヴィンシロスアンスでの職業はjusticaryと記録されている。彼は1170年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアケルソで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David Olifard(이)가 대략 1115년 영국 노르섬프토실르 릴퍼드 c 위그스소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Muriel(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1129년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 켈소에서 Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1124년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 남아프리카 카아프로빈시 로스이누스에서 justicary이었다. 그는 1170년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 켈소에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Olifard nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Lilford cum Wigsthorpe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Muriel, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard em 1129, em Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1124. Sua profissão aparece como justicary em Lothians, Kaapprovinsie, África do Sul. Ele faleceu em 1170, em Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Olifard родился около 1115 г. в местности лилфорд кум вигстаурп, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Muriel, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard в 1129 г. в местности келсо, роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в 1124 году.  Он работал по профессии justicary в местности лотянс, кааппровинси, Южная Африка. Он умер в 1170 г. в местности келсо, роксбургшир, Шотландия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Olifard nació aproximadamente 1115, en Lilford cum Wigsthorpe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William I Olifard Sheriff of Mearns, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Muriel, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard en 1129, en Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1124. Su ocupación registrada era justicary en Lothians, Kaapprovinsie, Sudáfrica. Murió en 1170, en Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, a la edad de 56 años.
